review_text: Stayed a night in one of the basic cabins. Very affordable, close to beach access (50m from the water) and very clean. Beds were  comfy and service was great.
Very friendly and pet friendly too
Outdated rooms. Paid same price as another updated cabin but ours was old and had mould in shower

Neatly kept, basic park. Staff are helpful and friendly. Camp kitchen is new and spacious. Toilet block could do with an upgrade. Maybe some low lights along the roads to help with the late night walks to the loo. Very close to beach and cafe
Caravan sites are excellent and spacious

Happy Friendly Lady at reception 😀  really enjoyed our 3night stay.  Powered site,  well kept grassy area, large site with water and drain. Toilet and shower facilities are clean and a great size.  Awesome Camp kitchen.  Easy access to the beach.

I had rented the Garden View Cabin 3 and it was cute, well maintained and clean. The only thing that bothered me was the ceiling fan in the bedroom was a little loose and knocked around when on which was very noisy. The park is huge, the camp kitchen is excellent and the employees are all very friendly. Moana Beach is only a minute walk away if that, it'd have to be one of the nicest beaches I've visited in the Adelaide region. Will definitely be coming back!
Beautiful park, close to beach, coffee shop and bar. Close drive to scenic spots, clean, shady, secure caravan. We shall be back
We had a great time at the park whilst visiting relatives and its facilities and proximity to the beach and shops were fine
Lovely place and convenient. The bathroom could do with a bit of a spruce up.The beach is beautiful. Daniel couldn't be more helpful when getting accommodation for us. Thankyou
Great powered site, nicely lawned, staff extremely friendly and helpful. Facilities in really good condition

We spent a very nice couple of days at Moana Beach Tourist park, the location was ideal for us to visit attractions in the area. The room and amenities were fine and the service was friendly and efficient. Would definitely use again if we were in the vicinity. The highlight of our stay was a visit to Wildhand farm  in Willunga where our host, Reece, showed us around to see his Highland cattle and rare Black nose sheep - a truly fantastic experience. Thanks Judy and Geoff

Great old fashion style caravan park.
Clean facilities.
No silly water parks.
Conected to.the best beach in Metro SA.

Close to every6thing the Southern Suburbs and McVale offer.

Awesome lawn as well.
Lovely,  clean cabins, very comfortable. Close to beach, wineries & eating places. Would recommend.
Lovely park. Green grass which is nice. Very clean amenities. Good beach access. Quiet. Lovely stay

My mum, 2 year old daughter and I decided to stay here for a few days so my mum could have some respite (she is my dad's full time carer). To say that we are disappointed is an understatement. The cabin we were in was very poky, shabby and dirty. There's no room to swing a cat in the bathroom in particular and barely enough room to set up a portacot. We mentioned this the minute we checked in, in the hopes of getting a refund and go elsewhere but management wouldn't come to the party (not even negotiate a partial refund) so we had to stay put...as unhappy customers! We decided to leave one day early.

The park is also not very kid friendly. There's no games room, no pool and no playground, just a tennis court! The kitchen was also very stingy in supplies and some of the channels on the tv didn't work. When I mentioned this to the lady at reception, she said it was the area (even though some cabins and caravans were able to get all channels, so we know that's bs) She also wasn't very friendly and got defensive. They need to seriously do an overall upgrade to this park and also work on their customer service. I think it's fair to say that we won't be back!!
Good beach side location, well kept park

Can drive on the beach.  Easy parking
Beautiful
Beautiful caravan Park next to the beach great showers and toilets everything clean will stay again 😘😘👍

Got a cabin, was hoping for a quiet night due to an early morning start but unfortunately we were in the middle of party central it would seem, the noise and music continued on until midnight. We doubt we will go back when in a similar situation and in need of a good night's sleep. We left a comment on their website but it seemed to disappear 🤔

Great location. Nice sites. Facilities are not well maintained and cleaned enough. Shower switches temperature every couple minutes which ends up in a cold shower. Wifi is as slow as it gets. No hot plates. Ive stayed at lots of campgrounds and its sad to see a location this good with these facilities (53$ pn for one adult)
Easy booking and checkin. Secure during evening with surrounding high fence and locked gates. Showers and toilets cleaned regularly. Nice close by, beach, cafes.
Had a powered site in the shade
Very clean and quite during night Close cafe and shopping centre

Right from the get go we were welcomed by friendly Daniel at the front desk. We had a powered site for an RV. Stayed two days. Very good amenities. Quiet park right next to the beach via beach access gate. Beautiful beach with toilets and cafe across the road. Highly recommend staying here.
Good size camp sites, clean amenities, excellent kitchen facilities.  Walking distance to beach and convenient drive to McLaren Vale.

Simple park with great location on the beach ⛱️ Clean amenities block. Large camp kitchen with lots of equipment.
Coffee and food venues close by.

Really great place.
Close to beach, clean amenities and good size sites.
Only let down is lack of kid play equipment. Otherwise great place to stay.

2 minutes walk from the beach.
4 min by vehicle to shopping centre and pub
Or a 15 min walk

I received multiple flea bites during my stay here, and this shower is just one example of the “cleanliness” provided. They would not offer a partial refund, and it is Aus consumer Law to provide accomodation at a reasonable standard. This cabin did NOT meet that standard. Would not recommend.

Great place. Good camping. But, there has been no money spent on toilet/shower block. Still missing tiles in some cubicles, cleaning in this area can be lacking lustre. Camp kitchen big with open sides, which can be cold when windy. 4 electric bbqs, when they all work.

We experienced one of the cleanest cabins, with the tidiest beds and utensils, across various states. Beach is accessible only 2-3 min away. The staff very friendly and responsive, even over the phone.

I found a cockroach in the bed...🤮
And the front door needs sealing, it was so windy while we stayed there. The wind was whistling underneath the door. It was so loud it kept you up until we found some cardboard.
Caravan park with cabins and sites. Lovely amenities and large camp kitchen. A coded pedestrian gate takes you right to the beach and Surf Lifesaving Club.
We stayed in a 2 bedroom cabin, and it was nice and clean. It was quiet and we had no issues. I would come back again :)
Well kept sites, great location adjacent to the beach, friendly, helpful staff

Love this lil park. Service is always chilled and friendly. Very efficient check in and great camp kitchen and amenities are always clean and plenty available. Have been a caravanner and cabin user and both priced well for location and quality of park. Great value for money.
Credit to this lovely safe and secure park. Amenities and camp kitchen were spotless and located a stones thrown to the beach. Only 3 unpowered sites but that’s ok. Fantastic experience.
Great caravan park

A variety of helpful facilities, accessible shopping centre in walking distance to the park, clean cabins and amenities.
A few odd characters but the Receptionist Casey more than made up for it with her understanding and caring nature.
Outstanding Service!!
Other than toilet locks having issues great vibes and pretty beach

Great caravan park. Grassed sites. Next to beach, Cafe over the road. Good camp kitchen. Only one toilet block so depending where your parked it might be a little walk. Shops about 1km away.  Cabins also available.  Enjoyed our stay.

been here for 5 nights and side ( walk in) gate can be pushed allowing anyone to walk in.
because of this we had all our food stolen from the ' camp kitchen '.
management didn't what to know about it!!.
police now involved.
wouldn't stay here again because of security!

We have stayed there a couple of times, a beautiful place for family quiet and relaxing time by your self.  All staff welcome you with a happy and friendly personality. Planning to stay again soon as we can

Garden Cabins are good. Clean throughout and Comfy beds. Parking for cabins 4 and five are a bit awkward so parked on the grass overnight. Park is easy walking distance to a few places to eat. Windy as while we were there so didn't explore this time.

We stayed one night in a cabin. Check in was easy and the cabin was clean and tidy. The TV was miniscule. A major problem was the aircon/heater did not function - something we only discovered after we returned from dinner when reception had closed. It was a cold night and we also felt chilly quite quickly. We tried calling the "urgent only" after hours number who were polite, promised to contact someone, but rang back to say they could not help. We got colder and colder and ended up having to take an early night simply to try to stay warm. The next morning was very chilly after rain. Reception were apologetic and promised to send a message to management. 5 days later and management have not responded.

This is not the first time we have stayed at Moana CP but they need to get their after hours response up to speed. A very cold and unpleasant night was not what we paid for.
Clean facilities,  roomy sites  but only 3 unbowed site.  Easy access to beach

I stayed in one of the cabins for 10 days. Great location close to the beach and places to eat. The Beach Hotel is only 10 mins walk. The cabin is a but dated but clean with everything you need. Very comfortable bed and pillows. Noticed excellent amenities for campers or caravan folk. The staff are very friendly and helpful. Will stay here again.
Very clean cabins. Staff very friendly and helpful. Will be going back.

Check-in was easy and the campsite was a great size — beautifully grassed too, which made setting up a breeze. It’s just a short walk to the beach, which was a real bonus.

The camp kitchen was huge, very clean, and had everything you’d need. There were plenty of toilet and shower cubicles available, which meant no waiting around. While the showers were technically ‘clean’, in the men’s the floors had a fair bit of dirt, dust, and soap scum build-up — it felt like they weren’t given a proper physical scrub very often.

Aside from that, Moana Tourist Park was a lovely place to stay and a really convenient spot to enjoy the coast.
Great park. Nice and clean with good sized grass sites. Great location. Just very noisy against the road with lots of loud cars and bikes going onto the beach.

The back of the men's toilet doors needs grime removed. It was the same last time we stayed there. There has been no improvement. The TV in the camp kitchen wasn't working, which was disappointing. The weather sent many people into the kitchen, and many people commented that the TV wasn't working. Only a couple of the BBQs were working properly, as in heating to a decent cooking temperature. The smoke from the BBQ and the guy cooking pizzas just waffled around in the room - You need exhaust fans to suck the smoke out. The vents in the roof don't do the job. Being a family weekend we could only hire the bikes between 10-3 pm as the staff only worked those hours. we couldnt hire them after 3 pm or return them after 3 pm. The lawns were in good condition and the roads were well maintained - better than our last stay. It states pet friendly basically in non peak periods or not longweekends, or shool holidays. There were plenty of dogs on leashes around the park which I don't have an issue with. My opinion is it is either pet friendly or its not! Make it pet friendly allyear around with pets on a leash as there were no issues that I could see with the unauthorised pets in the park.
Sites were great. Amenities were clean, easy beach access
Had the pleasure of staying here and it was fantastic!! Great clean tidy caravan sites, all easy to park. Exceptional clean amenities and awesome friendly and helpful staff!! Highly recommend.
Great location, staff so helpful and friendly
Cosy atmosphere and lovely place. Had the few stays so far always the best in the south.
It's a perfect spot for a getaway
Great beach caravan park.

Great caravan park. I had day surgery at Seaford day surgery which was conveniently just up the road. Cabin was great and easy short ride from the hospital. The park does not have any play equipment or such for young children, but the beach is just a short walk away
Stunning park and clean, flat beach ⛱️ 👌. Crowded park but I'd stay there again..
Great place to stay. Great people to deal with a I would recommend it to anyone and everyone.
What a beautiful location for a getaway. Close to a lot of facilities and places to visit
Great little caravan park, next to the beach with nice cafe and hotel nearby. Highly recommended

An amazing, friendly, clean, family environment for holidays
The best views, shopping centre so close 👌
The sea is warm
Ideal for swimming, canoeing, snorkelling, beach walking, fishing, hiking, biking, the sunset is magnificent 👌
Top spot. Good value.  Huge drive thru, grassed sites. We loved it.
Bien situé j'ai beaucoup aimé l endroit

Nice park, great location. Good price. Only negative is the shower head height is for people about 5ft tall. The heads are shoulder height. The plumber must have been short Haha... nice clean amenities and park. Would recommend.
Affordable place to stay in Adelaide. Absolutely recommend if you’re only here for a night or two.

Rooms were tired and small, but absolutely functional and appropriate to the price. Actually perfect for a beach holiday where you're going to cover everything in sand. We had a fairly well equipped kitchen, and used it to cook some yummy meals. There's a tennis court and the kids can just roam around safely.

It is a good holiday park with easy access to a patrolled, drivable beach (one of the best beaches in Adelaide I am told), the toilets are clean and for a council-run caravan park it is awesome, the best I've been to. However, the reason why it loses a star, is because the sites are very close together, which isn't ideal when it is busy and most of the sites don't have any shade which make it really unpleasant to be outside at your site on hot days.

It is a good park and I probably will be back, but it is probably better to go when it is less busy and when the weather is cooler. It could be a lot better if they spread the sites apart and planted more trees.
The place is not so far to the city and it is next to the beach, my family enjoy being there.

Great beach location.   Very good facilities. Friendly reception staff.  $70pn powered site 2 people peak season.
Two negatives..the constant road noise and revving cars etc going up and down onto beach across road.  Realise that this is out of management control so not rating on that. Should be much quieter outside Peak periods.
The other thing that Management could definitely improve is rubbish collection. At times all bins overflowing and in sun bit smelly . they request if overflowing campers take their own rubbish over to the skip bins other side park. ..sorry but that is your job to organise the bins to be emptied into the skip bin when needed.
Overall recommended. Nice grassy sites.

We had to change our booking at the last minute and rebooked for 3 weeks later. Told we would have to pay for the first night as it was less than 24 hours notice. Then we had to change again unfortunately and gave them 9 days notice. Told it would cost $35 as it was less than 2 weeks notice. Very confusing.
Perfect. Near the beach and Cafes. Nice, clean amenities and laundry. Has camping sites, caravan and RV sites as well as cabins and hire bikes for the kids.

There is absolutely nothing for the kids here. The camp grounds does have a tennis court, and that's it. Easy beach access, though. The kitchen is spacious, and the toilets are clean. Jam packed over the xmas holidays, so book in advance.
We didn't use the service of the rooms, so I can't comment on the room, but they look nice from the outside.
I want to give it a five star but struggle due to the fact that we found it hard to keep our 2½ year old entertainment.

Great place to stay for a few nights. We stayed in a cabin which was basic but clean, had comfortable beds, a great little kitchen and air conditioning which was a relief in the heat! The whole place was clean, today and very quiet even when it was quite full and busy. It was also nice and close to the beach, shops and cafes. Would definitely recommend a stay, if I need to go there again I wouldn’t hesitate to book.
No room between bed & wall.  No bedroom bin
A safe and beautiful place, with all the facilities.

We stay here at least 2 times a year, if not more. It's a great C/P for kids as there is a area for ball games, go-karts for a fee and the beach right next door. Clean amenities,  card operated dryers and washing machine,  a large area to dry your clothes, 2 outdoor showers, dump point, camp kitchen with everything you need to cook, book swap cupboard,  plenty of bins and recycling baskets.  The grass is always green and the girls are friendly in the office. There are cabins if you haven't your own RV. Highly recommend to book and definitely tell them what size your RV is as there are different sizes sites.

If you enjoy my reviews please follow us around Australia 🇦🇺.

The Caravan Park staff are very friendly and helpful. Trevor the Gardener does a fantastic job and is always willing to have a chat.
The amenities block could do with some renovations. In the 2 weeks we were there, the Showers hadn’t been cleaned, although the toilets were.
The Police visit there often and every night you have the sound of cars hooning up and down the road.
Nice place to stay close to beach and two coffee shops

Relaxation??? There wasn't any. If it wasn't the nightly ritual of hoons racing to beach it was two lots of domestic violence and both close to us. I know that's not the parks fault but it ruined our stay. Over 2 days cops coming to attend and the last morning bright and early waking to foul language and screaming. Amenities clean but need some on other side as long walk if your not set up with own toilet.
Also a huge group of travellers took over camp kitchen making it impossible to use facilities.
Very rude of them as they didn't pay more than us for its use
Overall I wouldn't return .
Very friendly, helpful staff. Clean amenities. Short walk to the beach... you need to keep an eye on the traffic on the beach. Many don't stick to the 10 km/hr limit.
Brilliant location right next to a marvellous swimming beach, close to a variety of other townships and beaches, jetty locations for fishing etc. Friendly locals a bonus!

Great stay at Moana Beach tourist park..
Easy access to the beach which comes alive at night time .. great walking path .along sea front

The park is in a good location but does get traffic noise from the hoons driving past to access the beach at all hours. Security wise- it needs attention as the boom gate does not get closed at all during the day and the beach gate isn't locked. Anyone can drive through and help them themselves. The wheelie bins need changing when it's busy as they were overflowing from Thursday to collection day on Monday. The reception wasn't always manned at check in times. Other than that the park is neat and tidy with good level grassed  sites.

This is a great spot for beach access. When we went the site we were given already had someone set up there. This guy had been there a week or more without paying & even after telling management nothing was done to remove him, it was a great spot but unfortunately we were given a new site & this spot was gross. It had no shade, the grass was dry & we were surrounded by caravans. This is a basic park & has little entertainment for kids so bring the fun with you or go to the beach. Sleeping at night is a challenge with all the hoons & groms doing burnouts up the local street. I personally won't be coming back here & I will be searching for something better for next time.

I stay a extended stay for 1 month at a time.at moana tourist Park The staff particualy Bell@ Chris & all the park employees are very friendly and help you any time with a situation. The cleaners do a up most thougher job at keeping the park clean the  4 bbqs are scrubed clean every day and the maintained lawns are keept in top shape by trever the friendly gardener. It is one of the best parks down south of adeliade. In my oppinion.Desmond Bennett.
Excellent location right near the beach , staff are beautiful , amenities are great only downfall is the park has a few sites that are like a junk yard 🥲. Shame as it’s such a great spot
Older cabins, but clean. Wifi was pretty slow. Facilities were great. Nice. Quiet.

Great park. Took our dog with us so stayed in designated area. Loved the closeness to the beach. Amenities were OK. Camp kitchen was very good. Deep Blue Cafe and surf club were right next door so great for takeaways or eating in. Clean sites but I imagine when full it could be a bit tight. |Overall a very relaxing weekend getaway.

The staff were so kind and friendly and more than happy to assist with any questions or needs! Thank you and thanks for the laughs over my reversing skill doubts! Sites were large and spaced out was so nice and not needing coins for laundry whooo hoooo!

We booked a cabin for two nights.  I found getting in co tact with the park difficult as I made many calls with no pick up.  The park lacks much fun stuff for kids like a games room or playground or pool.  Our cabin was shabby and quite dirty.  Gritty beds and just very shabby appearance of run down cabin.  This whole stay was really lacking.  Do not recommend.
Nice sized powered sites, great camp kitchen. Only issue was when sensor light came on near tv in camp kitchen, TV lost ch7 and ch9.

Nice spot and neat and tidy cabins. Wifi was terrible but the gate code also did not work. Stuck at gate for 10min until someone came along who's code worked. Others had to park outside because of incorrect code. Called emergency number and went to council saying it is closed. Sent an email with no response by the time we left 2 days later.

Great location, right next to beach. Cabins are nice, good size. Except showers.
Peaceful. You can listen to  waves anytime of day, watch amazing sunset from beach.

I arrived at Moana Caravan Park this morning with my friend, her tiny dog, and my two whippets. As a person who has regularly taken four well behaved dogs all over SA and further and been welcomed back again and again, I was amazed to be rudely dismissed because we dared to have three. We were going to use it as a regular close getaway often along with family and friends and their dogs, but there are plenty of other parks who welcome us. No rating. It doesn't deserve one. It won't go without one so I'll give the lowest and that's praising it.

We tried contacting the park to book a site, it took days for them to answer the phone, left so many messages, which they advised they never received.
Eventually managed to book a powered site.
We were situated near the beach exit ( road side), nice big site on a grassed area.

Hoons doing burnouts all night on the road,  2 parties of campers playing music and having fun into the early hours of the mornings. ( clearly not giving a damn bout other campers on site)

We asked to be moved to the other side of the park, which was so much quieter.
If you are staying here, be sure to ask for the quieter side of the park.

On the plus side, dogs welcome, amenities were kept clean and tidy and great location.
Beautiful walk along the ocean within walking distance.

I don't like giving low rated reviews, but this was not the best.
I'm  sure we would not stay here again.
We were in a campervan and enjoyed ourstay.it is close to the beach
SPA villa with KS bed was perfect for 2 person get-away.  Close to beach and cafes and short drive to McLaren Vale wineries. Perfect for our 3 night stay.
Loved this caravan park close to beaches and beautiful walks along the coast.
We were on a powered site in our much loved campervan.

Awesome spot.
We spent 4 nights here and thoroughly enjoyed it.

Power site for $42.
The staff was friendly when I had a reservation via phone.
After booking,received an email which need to have a signature and I booked successfully.
Cause I would late for check in (after 5pm) so I might receive a text which shows the password of the key box.
Unfortunately,I didn’t get any information of the password.
Spending time to deal with this problem till 8 pm.

Just wanna remind that anyone need to ask for the password of the key box if you will arrive late.

The kitchen is huge and clean. Enough place .Nice!
Lovely spot close to beach, facilities excellent.  But it's very noisy! 4WD's churning up the beach, spoil the beach,  and create noise until the early hours of the morning...
Very nice grass sites

Perfectly located CP on the beach
We loved our stay at Moana CP, perfectly located for all of the great things to do in the locality, Office Reception friendly , amenities fine.
We will definitely be back in the future.
Lovely caravan park right near the beach. Very good amenities & very helpful & friendly staff.
Great spot for a holiday the only downside is not long enough so we will be back

Great place. Clean and friendly.
Perhaps some more trees around the park for shade. Otherwise we loved it.
Nice park, 50 metres from the beach, good facilities

Amazing little spot .
Hiding away.
Great for the kids and 1 of the best beaches in Australia

Nice park
Green grass sites
Dog friendly
You can park on the beach
By a great beach, friendly staff. A lot of full time residents. Staff friendly and helpful. Had stuff stolen from the freezer which was very unusual.

Another monopolised council owned park. Toilets and showers very ordinary with no fan venting just static vents so it stinks most of the time. The prices are outrageous for what is provided but the staff do give a good limited time service.

We loved our time at Moana Tourist Park, small little caravan park, fairly quiet within the park itself, but had lots of hoons on the main road overnight. Toilets were fairly clean while we were there and hot water was plenty! Big grassed sites were appreciated! Other than go karts there is no other play equipment for the kids, however we quite like that; the beach was a stones throw away and our kids loved spending their days there! Would come back.

Nice place grounds are neat and tidy walking distance to the beach and restaurants.
However the amenities block was not clean. The shower cubicle was dirty with sand and bugs, the water pressure was zero and the shower head was loose I had to hold it up to get a trickle of water.
Great location walking distance to the beach, cafe. Clean amenities, friendly staff, good size sites grassed. 5 minute drive to shopping centre and fast food stores. Great camp kitchen
Very clean and tidily kept
Great location for a holiday break.
Nice and quiet when I stayed there. Ground staff very helpful and informstive
Clean and comfortable,  beautifully kept park, great amenities,  all that we needed for our short stay. Thankyou.

Fantastic spot.
Not too far from Adelaide city.
Right on a great beach.
Staff were very helpful.
Clean amenities.

Hoon central! Burnouts from 5pm everyday until early hours of the morning right next to our sites in the public car park and beach entry. Would never return based on this! What a buzz kill. Can’t wait to leave tomorrow!!
Awesome staff, and clean, big size grassy sites in a relaxed atmosphere
excellent park and lots of fun for grandkids

Very impressed with this beautiful clean park. Huge kamp kitchen,  nice laundry and clean amenities.  Will definitely be back. Friendly lady in the office.  Dogs allowed.  Walking distance to the beach ⛱️.  Just a beautiful place and well priced.
Went there with the kids and grandchildren. We loved every minute
Close to beach, good clean facilities. Great Price!

The staff went the extra mile by preparing the cabin bedroom with plastic candles and plastic rose petals at our insistence. However, the bed was extremely hard which we are both now regretting, no extra towels or pillows, no remote or easy access for the air conditioner and no dish washing liquid for the dishes we used and realised after the fact *barf*
I would also say if you are expecting a night in, in front of the television then bring glasses or binoculars lol
Stayed on friends site. Friendly staff. Clean facilities.
I visited here recently just to have a look around. The park appears clean and tidy and a quiet place to stay.
Brilliant spots will stay again.
After spending a wonderful week We needed to stay longer due to medical appointments but we did not have the full payment for 24 hours. Disappointingly we left and found another Caravan park.

Rooms run Down,Had to remind them Twice
For Bedding change.
Some staff need customer service training
Had an unpowered site for the night. Good amenities. Lots of noise from the road from hoons doing burnouts at the intersection.
Bed uncomfortable but other than that it was clean and easy to find.
The Park is pretty good, quite close to many amenities

What an excellent location for a holiday with kids, the cabin was spacious enough for 4 and comfortable and clean. The location had plenty of space as well as an outdoor kitchen area and a laundry. The only issue was the entrance to cabin 6c had a collapsing deck. I check out the others and it seemed to isolated to this one so I’d imagine it would be something they’d fix quickly.

Location is close to basically everything and near the main highway. 10-15min drive to main wineries what else do you need!

I’ve been to hundreds of caravan parks and this one was such a cute little set up right next to the beach. The site had beautiful green grass and views were amazing all round. Just a shame the lady at the front desk wasn’t very nice.

Beachside Villa we got wasn't exactly as pictured, there appears to be a few with different layouts so don't necessarily expect yours to look like the one on website. Beds were comfy though and the cabin was clean and tidy on arrival. Just a small amount of wear & tear standard with these places. Cabins are all nestled together in one area.
Awesome staff and location
